remember: Students will be able to recall the formulas for distance between two points, direction ratios and direction cosines of a line.
Students will be able to recall the concepts of the plane, its general equation, and the line in three-dimensional geometry.
Students will be able to recall the equations for the line in three-dimensional geometry, including the parametric and symmetric forms.
understand: Students will be able to understand the concept of direction cosines and direction ratios of a line in three-dimensional geometry.
Students will be able to understand the relationship between the direction cosines and direction ratios of a line.
Students will be able to understand how to find the equation of a line in three-dimensional geometry.
apply: Students will be able to find the distance between two points in three-dimensional geometry.
Students will be able to find the direction ratios and direction cosines of a line in three-dimensional geometry.
Students will be able to find the equation of a line in three-dimensional geometry, given the coordinates of a point and the direction ratios.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the given problem to determine the correct method for finding the equation of a line in three-dimensional geometry.
Students will be able to analyze the equation of a line in three-dimensional geometry to determine its direction ratios and direction cosines.

ncert_objectives: Recall the formula for the distance between two points in a three-dimensional space.
Derive the equation of a line passing through a given point and parallel to a given line.
Find the direction ratios and direction cosines of a line in a three-dimensional space.
board_exam_objectives: Find the distance between two points in a three-dimensional space.
Determine the equation of a line in three-dimensional geometry, given the coordinates of a point and the direction ratios.
Find the direction ratios and direction cosines of a line in three-dimensional geometry.
